title: Premium Wireless Headphones
description: Experience crystal-clear audio with our premium wireless headphones. Features 40-hour battery life, active noise cancellation, and premium comfort ear cushions.

title: Minimalist Leather Watch
description: Elegant minimalist watch with genuine leather strap. Swiss movement, sapphire crystal glass, water resistant up to 50 meters.

title: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches, programmable macros, and aircraft-grade aluminum body. Perfect for gaming and coding.

title: Indoor Succulent Plant Set
description: Set of 4 beautiful succulents in ceramic pots. Perfect for home or office decoration. Low maintenance, ideal for beginners.

title: Yoga & Fitness Mat Pro
description: Extra thick 6mm non-slip yoga mat with alignment lines. Eco-friendly TPE material, includes carry strap and bag. For all fitness levels.

title: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated 750ml bottle. Keeps drinks cold 24hrs or hot 12hrs. BPA-free, leak-proof lid, dishwasher safe.

title: Linen Throw Blanket
description: Ultra-soft premium linen throw blanket. 100% organic cotton, pre-washed for extra softness. Available in multiple colors. 150x200cm.

title: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° surround sound speaker with 20-hour playtime. IPX7 waterproof, dustproof, built-in mic, USB-C charging. Perfect for outdoors.

title: Classic Denim Jacket
description: Timeless classic denim jacket in premium 100% cotton denim. Regular fit, button closure, chest and side pockets. Machine washable.

title: Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable smart desk lamp with wireless charging pad. 5 color temperatures, touch controls, USB-A port, eye-care technology.

title: Running Sneakers Pro
description: Lightweight responsive running shoes with energy-return foam sole. Breathable mesh upper, reflective details for night runs. Available sizes 6-12.

title: Ceramic Coffee Mug Set
description: Set of 4 handcrafted ceramic mugs, 350ml each. Microwave and dishwasher safe. Minimalist design with matte finish. Perfect gift set.

title: Mechanical Pencil Set
description: Professional mechanical pencil set with 0.3mm, 0.5mm, and 0.7mm sizes. Metal grip, includes 30 extra leads and eraser refills.

title: Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with industry-leading active noise cancellation. 8hr battery + 24hr case, IPX4 water resistant, hi-res audio certified.

title: Hardcover Journal Notebook
description: A5 dotted hardcover journal with 240 pages of 100gsm acid-free paper. Lay-flat binding, ribbon bookmark, elastic closure.

title: Linen Tote Bag
description: Eco-friendly natural linen tote bag with reinforced handles. Large capacity, inner pocket, perfect for grocery or casual use. Reusable and sustainable.
